languages.text: {n}Полковник Батошски смотрит на вас исподлобья. Его ярко-зеленые глаза налиты кровью, а с губ срывается тихое рычание.{/n} "Я полковник Иждриг Батошски, командир 32-го меровского штрафного полка. Приветствую вас в Клети, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана".

{n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник Батошски смотрит на вас исподлобья. Его ярко-зеленые глаза налиты кровью, а с губ срывается тихое рычание.{/n} "Я полковник Иждриг Батошски, командир 32-го меровского штрафного полка. Приветствую вас в Клети, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана".

traits.locale_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you with his vibrantly green eyes become bloodshot and a low growl seeps through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

{n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

{n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you with his vibrantly green eyes. Grimly, pensively, without a shadow of joy.{/n} "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. Of the regiment's descendants, to be precise. You should not have come here, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

{n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you with his vibrantly green eyes become bloodshot and a low growl seeps through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

{n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

{n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキー大佐は鮮やかな緑の瞳であなたを睨みつける。厳しい表情で、考えにふけっている。喜びの影は全くない。{/n}「32番メローフ連隊の連隊長、バトシュスキー大佐。正確には、その連隊の末裔である。君がここに来るべきではなかった、君が。」
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you with his vibrantly green eyes. Grimly, pensively, without a shadow of joy.{/n} "Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, commander of the 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. Of the regiment's descendants, to be precise. You should not have come here, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text:
バトシュスキー大佐は鮮やかな緑の瞳であなたを睨みつける。厳しい表情で、考えにふけっている。喜びの影は全くない。
「32番メローフ連隊の連隊長、バトシュスキー大佐。正確には、その連隊の末裔である。君がここに来るべきではなかった、君が。」

languages.text: {n}Colonel Batoshski sieht dich böse an. Seine strahlend grünen Augen sind blutunterlaufen und er stößt ein tiefes Knurren aus.{/n} "Ich bin Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32. Merov-Strafregiment. Ich heiße Euch im Käfig willkommen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian."
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski sieht dich böse an. Seine strahlend grünen Augen sind blutunterlaufen und er stößt ein tiefes Knurren aus.{/n} "Ich bin Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32. Merov-Strafregiment. Ich heiße Euch im Käfig willkommen, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian."

languages.text: {n}Le colonel Batoshski vous foudroie du regard. Ses yeux verts sont injectés de sang et ses dents serrées laissent échapper un grondement sourd.{/n} « Et moi, je suis le colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32e régiment de la Légion Pénale de Merov. Bienvenue dans la Cage, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. »
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel Batoshski vous foudroie du regard. Ses yeux verts sont injectés de sang et ses dents serrées laissent échapper un grondement sourd.{/n} « Et moi, je suis le colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32e régiment de la Légion Pénale de Merov. Bienvenue dans la Cage, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian. »

languages.text: {n}El coronel Batoshski frunce el ceño cuando te mira. Sus ojos, de color verde brillante, están inyectados en sangre, y su voz es un gruñido grave.{/n} «Soy el coronel Izdrig Batoshski, del 32.º regimiento penal de Merov. Le doy la bienvenida a la Jaula, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian».
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel Batoshski frunce el ceño cuando te mira. Sus ojos, de color verde brillante, están inyectados en sangre, y su voz es un gruñido grave.{/n} «Soy el coronel Izdrig Batoshski, del 32.º regimiento penal de Merov. Le doy la bienvenida a la Jaula, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian».

languages.text: {n}Albay Batoshski sana öfkeyle bakıyor. Parlak yeşil gözleri kan çanağı gibi ve dişlerinin arasından boğuk bir hırlama kaçıyor.{/n} "Ben Albay İzdrig Batoshski, 32. Merov Ceza Alayı. Kafes'e hoş geldiniz Seberian'ın vârisi."
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay Batoshski sana öfkeyle bakıyor. Parlak yeşil gözleri kan çanağı gibi ve dişlerinin arasından boğuk bir hırlama kaçıyor.{/n} "Ben Albay İzdrig Batoshski, 32. Merov Ceza Alayı. Kafes'e hoş geldiniz Seberian'ın vârisi."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基上校皱着眉头盯着你。他明亮的绿眼睛布满血丝，齿缝间挤出低沉的咆哮。{/n}“我是伊兹德里格·巴托什斯基上校，隶属梅罗夫第32判罪军团。欢迎来到牢笼，塞贝里安的继承人。”
languages.original_text: {n}Colonel Batoshski scowls at you. His bright green eyes are bloodshot and a low growl escapes through his teeth.{/n} "I am Colonel Izdrig Batoshski, 32nd Merov Penal Regiment. I welcome you to the Cage, heir of Seberian."
